headline: JPMorgan: CLARITY Act Has Only A Narrow Window To Succeed, Timing Is 'Pivotal'

The biggest sticking point remains whether stablecoin issuers can offer yield-like products.

headline: How The Standard Life (LSE:SDLF) Narrative Is Shifting With Aegon UK And Capital Light Growth
summary: The updated analyst narrative around Standard Life now centers on a higher fair value estimate of £8.20 per share, up from £7.58, and raised price targets such as the move to 950 GBp at JPMorgan. Analysts link these changes to the expected impact of the Aegon UK acquisition, the shift toward a capital light growth profile, and the execution risk tied to synergy delivery. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces shape the evolving story and what to watch next in the stock’s...
